title: location package
description: An import for all major locations

lore.title: Wilāyat al-Ḥaramayn
lore.summary: The Holy site of all the matriarchy.
lore.body: The center of the matriarchal world, the Haramayn is a vast, sacred complex that serves as the spiritual and political heart of the matriarchy. It is a place of pilgrimage, worship, and governance, where the most powerful sheikhas reside and where the most important rituals are performed. The Haramayn is also a symbol of the matriarchy's power and influence, and it is revered by all who live under its shadow.
